quoteFirst: At the first stroke of the cathedral bell, which had been arranged to strike at
quoteLast: , being the real meridian time for 4 p.m. at Toronto, the congregation rose to their feet and at the second joined with those outside in uplifting with heart and voice their loyal prayer, '_God save our gracious Queen_.'
